Units.Unit: Unit I: PN Junction and Applications

PYQs.question: Explain the formation of depletion region in a PN junction with energy band diagram.
Derive the diode current equation and discuss the effect of temperature.
Compare half-wave and full-wave bridge rectifiers with waveforms and ripple factor.
Design a full-wave bridge rectifier with capacitor filter for a 12V DC output.
Draw and explain the input and output characteristics of a BJT in CE configuration.
Define alpha, beta of a transistor and derive the relation between them.
Design a voltage divider bias circuit for a CE amplifier with given operating point.
Explain the concept of DC load line and Q-point stability.
Explain the working of an n-channel JFET with drain characteristics.
A JFET has Idss=10mA, Vp=-4V. Find Id when Vgs=-2V using Shockley equation.
Compare enhancement-mode and depletion-mode MOSFETs with transfer characteristics.
Why are MOSFETs preferred over BJTs in digital circuits? Explain.
List the ideal characteristics of an op-amp and compare with IC 741 parameters.
Explain the concept of virtual ground in an inverting amplifier.
Design an inverting amplifier with gain -10 using op-amp. Draw the circuit and derive gain.
Explain op-amp based integrator and differentiator circuits with waveforms.
Convert (AF2)16 to binary and octal.
Prove De Morgan's theorems using truth tables.
Simplify F(A,B,C,D) = ∑m(0,1,2,5,8,9,10) using 4-variable K-Map.
Design a 4-bit binary adder using full adders.
